data.body:
=== RESUMPTION GUIDE (epic sure-foyer-aroma ac1b) ===
ENV: worktree .claude/worktrees/dso-code-review-16, branch worktree-dso-code-review-16, base origin/main. ALWAYS: source .venv/bin/activate (rebar must resolve to worktree venv). GATE FIX (bug sue-skimp-tear) is LANDED on main (change 320): rebar bypasses the loopback headroom proxy for its LLM calls, so review-plan/completion-verifier WORK. Do not re-debug that.
STACKED GERRIT CHANGES pushed (branch commits on origin/main base, submit whole stack at END per user): 325=f93a, 327=4b56, 328=f983 (all CLOSED+signed). Next commits stack on top; push each with 'git push gerrit HEAD:refs/for/main' (commit-msg hook adds Change-Id; pre-commit needs venv active for mypy).
PER-STORY PIPELINE: rebar review-plan <id> (BLOCK? remediate by EDITING the ticket description to specify under-specified data-flow, re-review until PASS) -> rebar claim <id> --assignee joeoakhart -> implement (delegate to general-purpose subagent w/ precise brief, RED->GREEN) -> verify tests+ruff+mypy myself -> git commit -F (rebar-ticket: <id> trailer + Co-Authored-By) -> rebar transition <id> in_progress closed --reason='Fixed: ...' for bugs (completion-verifier must PASS; it catches real gaps) -> git push gerrit HEAD:refs/for/main. NOTE: overlay stories need OVERLAY_IDS + criteria_routing.json in sync AND a base-prompt catalog bullet (WS1/WS2 drift guards).
DONE: gate-fix(320), f93a(325), 4b56(327), f983(328). IN FLIGHT: 3c5d (claimed, plan PASS after adding commit-message + per-overlay-context data-flow specs to its description; impl subagent running).
REMAINING after 3c5d: da25(conflict-marker DET detector), 7c58(coach moves moves.py), 1669(FP-ledger+telemetry gate_dispatch.py+docs), da8a parent + 0f8f(tests overlay) which unblocks specialists 1ead/3cb3/a010/d71f/f894 (enrich reviewers/code-review-*.md, each recall+no-fire). Then submit the whole Gerrit stack (each change needs LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1; poll via Gerrit REST as JoeOakhartNava; POST /a/changes/<n>/submit the TOP submits ancestors) and close epic ac1b.
